stemHtml: F-GTPO transmits on Lille Tower 118.550: "Mayday x3, Lille Tower, F-GTPO, complete engine failure, forced landing on grass strip parallel to runway 20, right hand downwind..." Is this correct?

options.a: The elements are in the correct order and on the frequency in use.
options.b: Emergency calls must always be on 121.500 MHz.
options.c: The position report should be placed differently.
options.d: Even on the correct frequency, position should precede intentions.
